entry.title: Integrate powerapps SAP Connector with SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI
entry.content:
Hi,

If we already have SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI implemented with IAS Azure AD as Corporate Identity Provider.

It is possible to perform SSO to integrate an application in powerapps using ERP connector (Microsoft Entra ID (with certificates)) with SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI

Regards

entry.title: Re: ECN API error: Unable to load ECNs of the current ins...
entry.content:
I believe a new version of SAP HANA Cloud Central has been rolled out today which I hope resolves this issue.  I tried it quickly just now and was successful.  

Regards,
Dan

entry.title: Re: Reset OriginDataLastChgUTCDateTime (accidentally set...
entry.content:
Dear Joyca,

 the sequencing table can be reset only with the help of SAP support. Please open a ticket to reset the table and provide the SequenceID you use in your OData calls.

Best regards Andreas

entry.title: Re: Add mappings is not working in SAP HANA Cloud Instance
entry.content:
I believe a new version of SAP HANA Cloud Central has been rolled out today which I hope resolves this issue.  I tried it quickly just now and was successful.  

Regards,
Dan

entry.title: Error handling of incoming forecast / delivery schedules / JITs from customers in Public Cloud
entry.content:
I did a lot of research in the SAP community, on the process navigator, on the SAP store, but I didn't find any information about how it is planned to handle errors related to incoming forcast and delivery schedules in S/4HANA cloud public edition.

In the automotive business one of the main tasks in the sales departement is managing the incoming delivery schedules (per EDI) related to existing scheduling agreements. Usually you get really a lot of delivery schedules per day and usually there is a lot of issues as well, for instance if there is a mismatch in the cumulative quantities.

There is the message dashboard of the Application Interface Framework but as I understood this monitor is for technical experts, to see if incoming EDI was posted successfully or not. But what I need is a monitor for the sales departement. A monitor that links the incoming EDIs with the scheduling agreements, shows cumulative quantities and other details, compares information in the EDI with the scheduling agreement, let me adopt the info in the EDI or in the scheduling agreement etc.

Is there any monitor that provides the needed functions?

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Order in S4/HANA from SAP IBP
entry.content: @Ryan, I get that it is not a very standard thing that you do everyday.. but without going much into the functional details , have you worked with any of those options ?

entry.title: Re: APK file from MDK app, signature verification failed
entry.content: What MDK Version are you building with in Cloud Build and what Android OS version is the device running?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Property Count
entry.content:
Hi @daianealves ,

I have attempted the same scenario using scripting, working with the CustomerID dimension and its associated Region property, as illustrated in the image below.

 

There are repeated regions for each customer, so I performed a count based on the Region property.

1. Add button write script as follows

2. Create script variable 

in my case Central East West South

4. Add text box for showing count regionwise 

in text box add dynamic text "script variable"

4. Final result as shown in pic

Count of repeating member show in highlighted area 

Kindly upvote and accept the answer if you find it helpful.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Derivation in SAP Analytics Cloud Planning – Advanced Scenario
entry.content:
Hi Hartmut,

One question on [d/Date] = "202101". I understand using this in LINK statement, as the link model has been populated with constant value "202101" but wondering why do we need in DATA statement ? 

 

DATA([d/MEASURE] = #DRIVER, [d/Date] = "202101", [d/t.S:SAP_ALL_CUSTOMER] = "#", [d/SAP_ALL_COMPANY_CODE] = "#", [d/SAP_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT] = "#",
	 [d/t.S:SAP_ALL_FUNCTIONALAREA] = "#", [d/SAP_FI_BPL_FIXVARIABLE] = "#", [d/SAP_FI_BPL_QUANTITY_UNIT] = "#") =
LINK([KOE__PLANTPRODUCT], [d/Version] = "public.Actual", [d/Date] = "202101", [d/MEASURE] = "DRIVER")

entry.title: Re: Hi Can someone please help in finding the replacement...
entry.content:
Hello Prakratimahur, 

the Design Studio Fiori app taht you mention above has been deprecated and is replaced by the Web Dynpro app, see eg. here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e296651f454c4284ade361292c633d69/d172d97b2cd0419e985e52e17ca754e1.html?locale=en-US&version=2021.000 .

Analog deprecations have usually happened for other apps that are related to this. 

Best, Joerg

entry.title: VPN between SAP DATASPHERE and AZURE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Configuring a VPN between SAP DATASPHERE and AZURE is required as an additional security measure. It is required from AZURE to enter SAP DATASPHERE but when you want to enter DATASPHERE it asks you for a VPN username and password to access the information.

How do I set up a VPN on AZURE to access DATASPHERE?

Best regards.

entry.title: Short dump when implementig note
entry.content: Implementation of note 3481992  in NGD ends with a shortdump

entry.title: Intent-based Navigation - semanticObjectAction annotation
entry.content:
In my FE object page, I want to make a field clickable to navigate to a second app using Intent-Based Navigation.

My CDS view annotations are:

 

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'AccountingDocument'
@UI.identification: [{ 
    type: #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION, 
    semanticObjectAction: 'displayDocument', 
  }]

 

 

But when I click on the field, it brings up a list of available action links, one of which is the action that I want.

I don't want to show the user the other links, I want it to navigate directly to the Intent specified by the annotations.

In the browser preview, it shows that the correct annotations are loaded:

So why does it not navigate to the intended target instead of bringing up a list of actions?

Thanks

entry.title: Returns of Vendor Consignment Goods
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

For consignment return to supplier, as per following SAP Help portal, Consignment return with shipment processing is allowed only for SAP retail.

 

Returns of Vendor Consignment Goods | SAP Help Portal

 

Please advise how consignment return to supplier can be processed with shipment where system is not SAP Retails and we have EWM integrated.

 

Regards,
PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Returns of Vendor Consignment Goods
entry.content: How consignment return to supplier can be processed with shipment where system is not SAP Retails and for how supplier can be processed when EWM is integrated

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Spaces and Pages now listed in the SAP Fiori apps library
entry.content:
Thank you @Jocelyn_Dart for this article. Really appreciate it but I am unable to find the space/page information in the Fiori apps library even for the same application that you had illustrated with a screenshot. I have attached my window's screenshot fyi. Could there be any setting that I am missing?

 

Thanks,

Akhil.

 

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Is There a Script Example for Exception Handling in O...
entry.content:
Finaly, I created this groovy that gets the response body Json.

import groovy.json.*;
import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
def Message processData(Message message) {
// get a map of properties
def map = message.getProperties();

// get an exception java class instance
def ex = map.get("CamelExceptionCaught");
if (ex != null) {
def odataException = ex.getCause();
if (odataException.getClass().getCanonicalName().equals("com.sap.gw.core.ip.exception.ODataResponseParsingException") ||
odataException.getClass().getCanonicalName().equals("com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.exception.ODataProcessingException")) {
if (odataException.getCause().getClass().getCanonicalName().equals("org.apache.olingo.client.api.communication.ODataClientErrorException")) {
// Convert payload to JSON
def jsonBuilder = new JsonBuilder(odataException.getCause().getODataError());
message.setBody(jsonBuilder.toPrettyString());
message.setHeader("CamelHttpResponseCode", "200");
}
}
}

return message;
}

 

This is the return:

entry.title: Re: Is There a Script Example for Exception Handling in O...

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
@Heidilee 

Hi,

Please do share Is there any update on the Proxy functionality  on the new learning home page.  

  • The "Launch Proxy" action (Learning Administration > People > Users > Actions) will display the legacy Learning home page, even with the "New Learning Experience" toggle on for the user being proxied.

Hi Team,

Please do share Is there any update on the Proxy functionality  on the new learning home page.  

  • The "Launch Proxy" action (Learning Administration > People > Users > Actions) will display the legacy Learning home page, even with the "New Learning Experience" toggle on for the user being proxied.

Please do share Is there any update on the Proxy functionality  on the new learning home page.  

  • The "Launch Proxy" action (Learning Administration > People > Users > Actions) will display the legacy Learning home page, even with the "New Learning Experience" toggle on for the user being proxied.

entry.title: Re: Federating queries to Databricks from SAP Datasphere for real-time analytics in SAP Analytics Cl
entry.content:
Hi @Sangeetha_K,

we also tested the OAuth2 authentication using the URL-based solution, and it worked as you described. However, we came across guidance from SAP suggesting that including the secret in the URL is not recommended. This raises security concerns on our end. Could you share any recommendations or additional insights on this approach?

Thank you,

Bernhard

entry.title: Re: How to redefine RDS based OData services?
entry.content:
Yes, it worked....

@Sid09  Thank you ^^

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Order in S4/HANA from SAP IBP
entry.content: If you were so inclined despite the oddity of the planning system creating sales orders, then you could invoke the BAPI or utilize an OData API to create the transaction.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Spaces and Pages now listed in the SAP Fiori apps library
entry.content:
Hi @AkhilAjayan

This option depends on the release of your system.
You must indicate the release and depending on it, the spaces and pages will appear (or not).
For example, you can indicate 2023 and you will see that the spaces and pages appear.

 

Although it depends on the release of your system, it will be available or not.

I hope it is helpful.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: APK file from MDK app, signature verification failed
entry.content: @bill_froelich the MDK version is 24.4 and the devices are running Android 10, 11, 12, 13, and 14 so I have set the minimum acceptable Android version to 9 when creating the build.

entry.title: Windows Username automatically populating sapshcut.exe
entry.content:
I am trying to create a shortcut to our SAP system using sapshcut.exe, but I am encountering an issue where the username field is automatically populated with the Windows username. Below is the command I am using, but I expect the username field to remain blank to allow the user to sign in manually.

sapshcut.exe -sid=EAL -client=600 -user="" -pw="" -max -command=lm01

Running SAP GUI 8000.1.7.1161

entry.title: Re: Multi Selection on SAP List Report Object Page
entry.content:
Please check the following:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/multiselect-in-listreport-using-fiori-tools-in-vs-code/qaq-p/12483129

(Add an action with 

   "requiresSelection": true
)

entry.title: Change a property from SAC story script
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on a script to change a property from a SAC story.

The idea is that the planner can click on the property in the table (It displays both ID and the property), and then clicks on a button "Update Property". Then a popup opens, where it automatically displays the ID in a text box and the selected property in a dropdown. When the planner clicks on the dropdown to change it, it should be prefilled with all existing values of the property in the dimension.

Is this possible?

I have the script working for the next part with "createMembers" API.

Thanks!

entry.content:
Hi

We would like our process orders and planned orders to have different colors in CM25. How is this customized? (without overwriting sap standard).

entry.title: Re: Equipment masterdata quick buttons
entry.content:
@cspeijerdiez 

These buttons are standard SAP features. You need to align with the ABAP programmer and do enhancement in the screen to remove these buttons. To see the maintenance history specific to this equipment you can refer:
1. The Object Information key in the top menu where you can show the brief history card of the equipment.
 

2. Another way is to go to Environment in top menu bar and select order or Notification to see the history of the equipment in notifications or orders.

Regards,

Vaibhav Mishra

I don't know what a formatted search is or how to perform one, can you give me any further information?

Thanks.

Thanks for your blog, I was wondering if you have faced an escenario where the instance has multiple brands, and each of the brands manage their own linkedin account.

Is it possible to differentiate the brands associated with each brand? The two brands only share one language.

entry.title: Re: Error - Failed to start outlook, Internal Instance of outlook is null.
entry.content: I have screenshots of the SDK and error but cannot add them here unfortunately.

entry.title: Creating IBP time periods including weights
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am looking for a smart way of creating time periods including weights for technical weeks etc. So far I have always uploaded the time periods provided in the SAP Best practice, however it ends in 2028! 

According to SAP help there are three options:

  • You can generate time periods using an application job in the Application Jobs app.

  • You can download a template with time periods in the Data Integration Jobs app and then upload them from the comma-separated values (CSV) file.

  • You can upload time periods from SAP Cloud Integration for data services.

Application job does not create weights, creating a file for Data Integration App is quite some work. But I have not figured out how to use CI-DS. Does anyone know? Or maybe you have a smart approach on how to create an upload file. Or of course you might even have it and are willing to share 😀 

Thanks in advance,

Maike

entry.title: Using XML-nodes in Transformation
entry.content:
Hi,

I´m splitting up an XML-file into single nodes and want to put that nodes into different XML-transformations.

My current code is this:

" iXML-Object

DATA(lo_ixml) = cl_ixml_core=>create( ).

" XML-Document

DATA(lo_xmldoc) = lo_ixml->create_document( ).

" Stream-Factory

DATA(lo_xmlsf) = lo_ixml->create_stream_factory( ).

" Stream

DATA(lo_stream) = lo_xmlsf->create_istream_xstring( string = lv_xstring ).

" Parser-Object

DATA(lo_parser) = lo_ixml->create_parser( document = lo_xmldoc

istream = lo_stream

stream_factory = lo_xmlsf ).

 

IF lo_parser->parse( ) = 0.

"Root-Node

DATA(lo_root) = lo_xmldoc->get_root_element( ).

 

" Get all E1EDKA1-nodes

DATA(lo_nodes_e1edka1) = lo_root->get_elements_by_tag_name( name = 'E1EDKA1' ).

" Iterator for found nodes

DATA(lo_node_iterator) = lo_nodes_e1edka1->create_iterator( ).

" first iterator-value

DATA(lo_nodes_temp) = lo_node_iterator->get_next( ).

" Iterate

WHILE NOT lo_nodes_temp IS INITIAL.

" Get child nodes

DATA(lo_node_children) = lo_nodes_temp->get_children( ).

" Get iterator for child nodes

DATA(lo_child_iterator) = lo_node_children->create_iterator( ).

" Get first child

DATA(lo_child_node) = lo_child_iterator->get_next( ).

 

I now want to loop over that nodes and want to call transformations for every node. I saw that there is a render-function, but how can I use that function to create XML-itabs from the nodes to use them in the transformation?

entry.title: Re: Ariba SLP - How to Stop ERP Sync in progress
entry.content:
Hello

In this case you can mark the message type "Request_In" as Failed and then you can select the Reprocess "Reprocess" in the status column and click on the Reprocess button.

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal ID or Not ?
entry.content: Am seeing the same issue as I also need to recertify. I had my old SAP account unlinked from my Universal ID and need to link a new account.

entry.title: Query about accruals in the rebate process 1B6 in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are implementing the 1B6 rebate process in #SAP S/4HANA, and the client has a specific requirement regarding the accruals for the condition contract.

The objective is for the corresponding accruals to be reflected individually in the conditions of each sales document or invoice that contributes to the business volume of the condition contract (these could be statistical if it is only possible to settle the accruals through Settlement Management). This would provide greater predictability and clarity for the client when granting other types of discounts.

We are currently investigating whether this can be achieved using standard functionality in SAP S/4HANA or if a custom development would be required.

Has anyone worked on a similar scenario or has experience with this type of configuration? Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Matías

Is it possible that the sessions are tagged incorrectly?

Best  regards

Christian

BADI: Modification stable against updates! Logical continuation of OO

VALUE BASE instead of APPEND

Heike

entry.title: Re: How to Customize the Main Navigation Menu?
entry.content:
Hello,

You can go with the tool 'Text Replacement'.
Here you can set replscement text for default texts.

entry.title: Credit note automatically deducted from invoice balance
entry.content:
SAP B1 v10

Good afternoon,

When a credit note is created from an existing invoice, it automatically reduces the open balance. Is there a way around this? They are two documents with unique identifiers, but on Account balance or Internal reconciliation it is one line with balance and balance due. Sometime I need to be able to use just the credit note or the full original invoice value, particularly when allocating payments of course.

For example, if I issue a credit note to a customer for an invoice not yet due, more often than not that will be deducted from a payment before the customer has to pay the actual invoice. This means I have to leave a balance on another invoice until the original invoice is paid. Is there a better solution?

Hopefully this makes sense!

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Order in S4/HANA from SAP IBP
entry.content: @Ryan, could you share some link or documentation no how to do it using the OData API ? Do we need to go for a REST Based Webservice in CI-DS or utilize Comm arrangements ?

entry.title: Re: What's the successor off Data Intelligence for Data I...
entry.content:
It's Jan 2025 and SAP Data Intelligence was not retired in 2024. Any new updates on strategy?

@TuncayKaraca @Cocquerel

entry.title: Re: Incorrect escape parameter for tag : DescriptionOfNat...
entry.content:
Marc,

for facts with data type dtr-types:textBlockItemType issuers should always set the iXBRL attribute @escaped to ‘true’. Yes Agreed. Meanwhile, facts with other data types, such as xbrli:stringItemType should instead set the attribute @escape to ‘false’, as their values should not contain XHTML.

The question is about the xbrli:stringItemType tag.

Iwona

entry.title: Re: What's New with SAP Datapshere in Q4, 2024 ✨

entry.title: Re: Dates and Roundings in Compensation
entry.content:
Hi Xavier (@xavierlegarrec)

I have a consultant who is trying to get your Example 5 code to work. It works just fine if the editable date column is changed from the default empty value. However, if you change another editable column on the worksheet (e.g. merit) then the 0/1 column changes to 1, even when the editable date field is still 'empty'. I have replicated his findings.

Can you help?

Phil

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal...
entry.content: You need to contact sso@sap.com as @Sandra_Rossi suggested, and ask to have your P-user ID updated with your Yahoo email address. Once that change has taken place, you can link the Yahoo email address to your Universal ID.

entry.title: Re: hxehost:53075 not responding
entry.content:
Hello Z-k,

you can disable the firewall permanently with "sudo systemctl disable firewalld".

See also the comment to the accepted solution.

Kind regards!

entry.title: Re: Provide UID audit history
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

You can use Audit Log or Profile Audit Log to see the past events for the corresponding user.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Solution Support

entry.title: Re: IW37N how to generate a report with multiple Partner...
entry.content:
hello @Strebord ,

There is no feature to provide multiple partners entry on IW37N report but you can check this in Fiori report - Find Maintenance Order and Operation. If the report does not help then create a query between VIAUFKS and IHPA table and try to get the desired result.

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Order in S4/HANA from SAP IBP
entry.content: @Ryan, not a public cloud.

entry.title: SAP CPQ 2.0 Document generation - dynamic template selection with option to edit the content
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working on my first SAP CPQ implementation project as a consultant. Our customer has a specific requirement for document generation.

Context:

  • Configurable products
  • Multi-section templates
  • Various text templates as .docx files

Requirement: 

For a section in the final document, the customer requires a specific long text based on the combination of two specific product attributes. Additionally, the text should be editable before the document is created.

Problem: 

Using section templates, I cannot dynamically select a template file based on the combination of attributes. Currently, I can only upload one template for each section. While I know that I can replace the section template, I do not want the user to manually choose one template out of approximately 50 templates (from local storage) for this single segment of the final document. The "manage content documents" tab is not an option because the content of the templates must be editable.

Process:

  1. Define attributes from the configurable product (happens automatically with configuration).
  2. Automatically choose the specific template based on the values of the attributes (works only when content does not need to be edited).
  3. If necessary, edit the text of the template (problem).
  4. Create the final document with the edited text.

Could you please assist us with this issue?

Thank you very much for your help.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Message Postings: add a new validity period ... from BAPI BAPI_RE_CN_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hi, 

I got it to work by only adding the new timeslice.  The BAPI automatically ends the old timeslice of the payment term (BAPI table TERM_PAYMENT).

 

Good luck,

Lou

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal...
entry.content: Thank you so much @AnnePetteroe

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Order in S4/HANA from SAP IBP
entry.content:
You'd want to refer to something like this from the API business hub which should cover on prem./private cloud options, but make sure you select the appropriate version.  https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_SALES_ORDER_SRV_0001/resource/Sales_Order_Header

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: PR/PO Release Strategy based on a yearly budget for approvers
entry.content: Did you find a solution? I have a similar requirement. If anyone has done anything similar to this, please let me know. parag945psm@gmail.com

entry.title: Re: IW37N how to generate a report with multiple Partner...
entry.content: Thanks Vaibhav. I don't have the authorization in my organization to set-up either of those solutions, but I appreciate the information.

entry.title: Re: Possible to add a new supplier whose master data does...
entry.content:
Hi,

A one-time vendor refers to a vendor from whom materials are not procured frequently, typically used for occasional purchases or for obtaining quotations. Procurement from such vendors may occur once a year or on a need basis.

The process of creating a one-time vendor is similar to creating a regular vendor using transactions XK01 or FK01. The key difference lies in the Vendor Account Group. A separate account group is defined for one-time vendors, requiring only minimal vendor information during creation.

For one-time vendors, the vendor's address and other relevant accounting details are maintained at the time of creating the Purchase Order (PO) and Invoice Receipt (IR).

If you need to convert a one-time vendor into a regular vendor, you can update the vendor account group and maintain any additional data required for regular vendors.

Regards

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: @graziela I would like to ask a question regarding the /5PY wage type generating a negative amount on the W-2 form for concurrent employment. Is there a way we can move the /5PY wage type to RT_Person, and what would be the impact if we make changes to Table V_T7CCE_PERS_WGT and V_T7CCE_CUM_RT_P with an effective date starting from the beginning of this year? I believe this could cause issues during the retro run. Do we have any solutions to avoid the negative /5PY at the personnel number level?

entry.title: Service Entry Sheet remains 'in approval' but should auto approve
entry.content:
We have problem with approval of service entry sheets.
The SES should auto approve but after sending for approval they remain in status 'In Approval' (20) .

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Service Entry Sheet remains 'in approval' but should...
entry.content:
This issue is covered in KBA 3258263.

When a Service Entry Sheet is sent for approval, the system tries to generate a goods receipt in the background from the workflow processing. If the generation of the goods receipt fails for any reason (eg: reference purchase order locked, cost center does not exist, posting period not open, account determination missing etc.), then the work item will be set in error, and the status of the Service Entry Sheet will remain open. 

Check the workflow log to know the reason the posting failed, follow below steps:

  1. Open the App 'Flexible Workflow Administration' enter document ID and prefix * has to be entered in the filter option Business object ID and click on Go. 
  2. Open the workflow that is in error.
  3. Click on 'Workflow Log' button appearing right side top corner.
  4. expand the entry in error.
  5. Again, expand the further errors where understandable error appears.

Once the issue has been corrected, resend the work item using resume button or send the Service Entry Sheet for approval again.

entry.title: Is output print preview button available in Manage Sales Order V2 App?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using the Manage Sales Order Version 2 app in Fiori to create and modify sales orders. However, we do not see an option for the Output Print Preview button in this app. Does this app support this functionality by default? If not, is it possible to add this button? Are there any additional configurations or settings required to enable this feature?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Sample Content for FI, HR and SD
entry.content:
Hello @Sebastian_Bock @JulianD ,

in this case, please open a ticket with component "DS-DM". In any other case, or let´s say the standard procedure for content support is described here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/42093f14b43c485fbe3adbbe81eff6c8/d6a9704239b545b2b7f5851bf031c863.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content:
@VEH2 Schema file can be found in CRA website File information returns electronically (tax slips and summaries)

@shiva906 Check that you have all notes implemented (they are all listed in main note) and you can test the XML. 

@jalpanthakkar34 I don't see /316 mapped to box 16 in standard delivered solution.

@etardiff there is a Note being tested at the moment for the employer C2Q amount in Relevé. 
Please monitor the Main Note for updates.

entry.title: [ Unable to find service undefined ] SAP Business Application Studio does't connect to Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
I have been creating views in Hana Studio for years and now I want to configure BTP Trial to see how to do this using SAP Business Application Studio.

When I try do Add Data Source in Projection:

There's a message:

Unable to find service undefined

I'm tryng to connect the SAP Business Application Studio with the Cloud Foundry, but when I click, the option does not open to the input required fields:

  • Select Cloud Foundry Organization
  • Select Cloud Foundry Space 

Does anyone know how to make this connection between SAP Business Application Studio and the Cloud Foundry Trial base?

entry.title: Problem to connect Business Application Studio to S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
I have done a RAP Application (and apparently, it's necessary to go throw BAS to end the Building of the App for the deployment and the end of the process).
I try to connect my system to Business application studio in order to deploy a Rap application to S/4 Public Cloud (and not BTP)

I was following the tutorial Connect SAP Business Application Studio and SAP S/4HANA Cloud System | SAP Tutorials

And in the step 4, I have an error Certificate cannot be saved in Address Book.

I check my roles in Development environment.
We are in 3 system landscape.

Christophe

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Sample Content for FI, HR and SD
entry.content:
Hello @dspokoinyi ,

please install the DataProduct first and second the Business Content. In case you have problems to install the DataProduct, please open a ticket with component "DS-DM"

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi @kristiyan ,

It's going to be the Plume distribution 🙂

entry.title: Re: Selecting a control from different pages using a rule...
entry.content:
You have it just about right but you will want to include #Value in your target path to get the value of the control as opposed to the control reference.  I did a quick test using this rule and it worked as expected.

export default function GetTabFieldValues(context) {
    let ta_sp = context.evaluateTargetPath('#Page:TabA/#Control:FCSimpleProp/#Value');
    let ta_lp = context.evaluateTargetPath('#Page:TabA/#Control:FCListPicker/#SelectedValue');
    let tb_sp = context.evaluateTargetPath('#Page:TabB/#Control:FCSimpleProp/#Value');
    let tb_lp = context.evaluateTargetPath('#Page:TabB/#Control:FCListPicker/#SelectedValue');

    console.log(`Tab A - ${ta_sp} - ${ta_lp}`);
    console.log(`Tab B - ${tb_sp} - ${tb_lp}`);

    return context.getPageProxy().executeAction({
        "Name": '/SCN_00045/Actions/GenericMessageBox.action',
        "Properties": {
            "Message": `Tab A - ${ta_sp} - ${ta_lp}\nTab B - ${tb_sp} - ${tb_lp}`
        }
    });
}

Table T52BO, no entry for work tax area or work tax authority

Rosette

entry.content: Conseguiu resolver? Estou com o mesmo problema

entry.title: Has anyone experience with within a month go-live for a S/4HANA migration? I need some advices.
entry.content:
We are about to plan the Go-Live for our S/4HANA Greenfield implementation project.

The plan is to use a public holiday + weekend to go live. This should happen withing the month. Which risks are you seeing here? Can you provide me with some advices?

Many Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow Manager roles
entry.content:
Hi Alejandro, 

Thank you very much for your feedback. I have found the cause of the error. The position and organizational unit from the organizational structure (PPOME) were not transferred to the HR Masta Data (PA30), so there was an inconsistency here. After I corrected the data in the HR Master Data, the processor rule worked and the manager was found.

Thanks for the help.
